patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/437

## Problem
Every CLI mutation echoes the full updated item + full `changed_fields` by default (368 B for a trivial create vs 29 B `--id-only` — 12.7x). MCP is already compact by default (`changed_field_count`, `idOnly`/`fullChangedFields` opt-ins), so the CLI is the more verbose surface and inconsistent with MCP.

## Proposed fix
Make CLI mutation default lean: `{ id, status, changed_field_count }` (+ `close_reason` on close). Full echo behind `--full` / `--full-changed-fields`; existing `--id-only`/`--quiet` stay. Config knob (e.g. `output_lean_mutations`) so the default is project-tunable; respect back-compat for scripts via config.

## Definition of done
Lean default (or config-flipped default) with parity spec vs MCP compact output; docs/AGENTS.md updated; contracts:update run; measured token reduction recorded on this item.
GH-437: make lean mutation output the CLI default (parity with MCP compact envelope)

Dogfood GH-437: CLI mutations echo the full item (12.7x vs --id-only) while MCP is compact by default; align CLI default with MCP. Duplicate check: compact mutation output PR (2026-05-26) shipped suppressor flags only; no open item flips the default.
CLI mutations default (or config-default) to id/status/changed_field_count; --full opt-ins restore old echo; MCP-parity spec green; measured reduction recorded
